/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/core/SaveSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/core/TimeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/data/ProductDatabase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/systems/CustomerManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/systems/InventoryManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/systems/RepairService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/systems/EventSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/UIManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/ShopPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/BottomNav.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/InventoryPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/RepairPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/ui/MainMenu.cpp.o -o BikeShopTycoon  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_mixer
